2605.30244.title: Reinforcement Learning with Robust Rubric Rewards
2605.30244.paper_summary: While Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is effective for deterministically checkable tasks, many vision-language tasks are partially verifiable, demanding multi-criteria supervision (e.g., perceptual details, reasoning steps, and constraints). Rubrics provide a natural interface for this fine-grained supervision, but their effectiveness depends on the execution accuracy during online RL. We propose Reinforcement Learning with Robust Rubric Rewards ($\text{RLR}^3$), extending RLVR from task-level verification to criterion-level verification. $\text{RLR}^3$ routes instance-specific rubrics through two execution paths: an LLM-as-an-extractor paired with a deterministic verifier, or an LLM-as-a-Judge for non-verifiable criteria. To ensure faithful scoring, $\text{RLR}^3$ introduce a minimal exposure strategy that masks ground truths from extractors and images from judges. Furthermore, $\text{RLR}^3$ employs hierarchical aggregation to prioritize essential criteria over additional criteria, and mitigates score saturation within rollout groups. Evaluated on Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B across 15 benchmarks, $\text{RLR}^3$ consistently outperforms RLVR, yielding a 4.7-point improvement over the base model and exceeding the official instruct-to-thinking model gap. Controlled audits confirm our deterministic verification and minimal exposure significantly reduce exploitable false positives.
2605.30244.paper_summary_zh: 雖然具有可驗證獎勵的強化學習（RLVR）對於可確定檢查的任務是有效的，但許多視覺語言任務是部分可驗證的，這需要多標準的監督（例如，感知細節、推理步驟和約束）。評分標準提供了一個自然的界面來進行這種細緻的監督，但其有效性取決於在線強化學習過程中的執行準確性。我們提出了具有穩健評分標準獎勵的強化學習（$\text{RLR}^3$），將RLVR從任務級別驗證擴展到標準級別驗證。$\text{RLR}^3$ 通過兩條執行路徑來路由特定實例的評分標準：一個是與確定性驗證器配對的LLM作為提取器，另一個是用於不可驗證標準的LLM作為裁判。為了確保忠實的評分，$\text{RLR}^3$ 引入了一種最小暴露策略，該策略將真實值從提取器中屏蔽，並將圖像從裁判中屏蔽。此外，$\text{RLR}^3$ 採用層級聚合來優先考慮基本標準而非附加標準，並減輕了回滾組中的分數飽和。在15個基準上對Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B進行評估，$\text{RLR}^3$ 始終優於RLVR，較基準模型提高了4.7分，超過了官方的指令到思考模型的差距。受控審核確認我們的確定性驗證和最小暴露顯著減少了可利用的假陽性。
2605.30244.author: Ya-Qi Yu et.al.
2605.30244.authors: Ya-Qi Yu, Hao Wang, Fangyu Hong, Xiangyang Qu, Gaojie Wu, Qiaoyu Luo, Nuo Xu, Huixin Wang, Wuheng Xu, Yongxin Liao, Zihao Chen, Haonan Li, Ziming Li, Dezhi Peng, Minghui Liao, Jihao Wu, Haoyu Ren, Dandan Tu
